briefdescription.para: This function runs a test on the RFSoC data converter device using the driver APIs.

detaileddescription.para:
This function does the following tasks:
Initialize the RFdc device driver instance
Set the fabric width.
Get the fabric width
Compare Set and Get fabric widths.

parameterdescription.para: is the XPAR_<XRFDC_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h.

listitem.para: XRFDC_SUCCESS if the example has completed successfully.
XRFDC_FAILURE if the example has failed.

briefdescription.para: Main function that invokes the polled example in this file.

listitem.para: XRFDC_SUCCESS if the example has completed successfully.
XRFDC_FAILURE if the example has failed.

briefdescription.para: This file contains an example for Gen 1/2 using the rfdc hardware and RFSoC Data Converter driver.

detaileddescription.para: This example does some writes to the hardware to do some sanity checks and does a reset to restore the original settings.
Users are expected to define XPS_BOARD_ZCU111 macro while compiling this example for ZCU111.
Users are expected to have a programmed CLK-103 module if using this example for ZCU1275/1285.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
8.1 cog 06/29/20 First release. cog 07/03/20 The metal_phys parameter is baremetal only. cog 07/03/20 The change clock to fit with new reference design. cog 07/03/20 Formatting and text changes.
